title: Glamorize Pro Dye Black Colour Hair Dye Ladies
description: Product description Hair Dye for Women is widely used to help lighten, darken, or tone grey hair. It also brings back dull hair into full life again with complete coverage. Glamorize Hair Dye will give you a new shade of colour. Available in a choice of 6 fantastic shades Dark Brown,Black,Blonde,Golden Brown,Light Blonde and Mahogany. 1 x pair of gloves. 1 x 40ml developer milk. 1 x 40ml colour gel. Ingredients dye
